allow: Bash(node deploy/query-trp.js "SELECT d.id, d.original_id, LEFT\(d.original,40\) as dict_original, LEFT\(d.translated,40\) as translated, d.status FROM wp_trp_dictionary_et_ru_ru d WHERE d.original_id IN \(7330,7332,7334,3614,7337,7341,7346,7347,7348,7349,7350,7351,7352,7353,7354,7355,7356,7357,7340\) AND d.original != '''' AND d.status = 0 ORDER BY d.original_id")
Bash(node deploy/query-trp.js "SELECT option_value FROM wp_options WHERE option_name = ''''trp_advanced_settings''''")
